title: Shefa Clear Plastic Cups - 100-1000- 3000 ForParty for Beer, Water, & Juice, for Dessert & Cold Drinks - Slush & Milkshake and Cocktail Cups - 180ml, 100 Plastic Glasses
features: Big Value Pack to Help You Save: Get more value for your money with our pack of plastic cups! Includes 100 pieces of 180ml plastic cup that you can use for a juice bar business or party.

Sturdy Plastic Cups for Your Favourite Drink: Unlike hard plastic glasses, our plastic party cups boast a crack-resistant construction that won't shatter. Our lightweight yet sturdy cup is easy to carry around.

Food-Grade Plastic for Safe Use: Kids & adults will enjoy gulping refreshing drinks using our plastic party glasses! Its BPA-free construction makes it safe to use for guests or customers of all ages.

Multipurpose Cups for Refreshments: Ideal for serving cold beverages & even dessert, our clear plastic cups can hold juice, beer, cocktail, candies, & other treats! Use them as slush cups, milkshake cups, or snack cups.
Staple for Every Occasion: Be it for your shop, office, or home—our plastic cups make serving drinks hassle-free! Click 'Add to Basket' now to stock up on these pantry essentials!
